<div><b><tt>PART C |[RITUAL: “The Ones I Missed”]</tt></b><tt><br></tt></div>
<div><tt><br></tt></div>
<div><b><tt>Name:</tt></b><tt> </tt><i><tt>The Night I Wasn’t There</tt></i><tt><br></tt></div>
<div><b><tt>When to Use:</tt></b><tt> When you feel you let someone down.</tt></div>
<div><b><tt>Tools:</tt></b><tt><br></tt></div>
<div><tt>  •  A candle (or a digital one)</tt></div>
<div><tt>  •  One line of truth about what you missed</tt></div>
